titleStmt.title: SII 5.228: original edition by H. Krishna Sastri
No. 228. (A.R. No. 552 of 1893). ON THE SAME TIER.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
... svasti śrī . tribhu vanaccakkaravatti śrīkarikālacoḻatevaṟkkut tiruveḻuttiṭṭuc
cellāninṟa tirunalliyāṇṭu 2 Āvatin Etir Etir Etir Etir kone(r)riṉmai
koṇṭān perurnāṭṭu perur Āḷuṭaiyār tiruvānpaṭṭiyāṇṭārk
ku nam Āḻvikku naṉṟāka nām kaṇṭa tirunālāvatu Aṟpikait tiṅkaḷt tirunāḷ
Eḻuntaruḷi Āḻvi piṟanta tirunāḷ Uttirāṭattin Anṟu tirttha m prasā tit taruḷuk
aikku viṭṭa nilamāvatu tirunāḷppaṭiyil Amutupaṭikkup paṭi yiraṭṭiyum
ciṟappukku kaṟiyamutum Uppamutum miḷakamutum paruppamutum naiyamutu
m tayiramutum caṟkaraiyamutum tiruviḷakkeṇṇaiyum Aṭaikkāyyamu
tum yilaiyamutum Aṣṭa paripālaṉaṅkaḷukkum yāga maṇṭapattukku Amutu
ceyyum de varkaḷukkum homadravya ṅkaḷukkum paṭi yiraṭṭi Amutu ce
yakkaṭava de varkaḷukkum ciṟappamutāna peruntiruamutukaḷukkum Ācāriya paricāraka
nukkum tirunāḷ cevikka vanta Āṇṭārkaḷukkum tirunāḷ cevikkavun tiruppatiyam pāṭu
vārkaḷukkum cevikkavanta viccāttikaḷukkum palivitattāl Uḷḷa Aḻivum maṭattil Ā
ṇṭārkaḷum Amutum maṟṟum nel Eṟṟi tirukkoṭimutal tirtdha mprasā tittaruḷina Aṉ
ṟu mutal tirunāḷ(p) pattukkum veṇṭum nel muṉnūṟṟu Aṟupatiṅ kalattukku nām
viṭṭa nilamāvatu perurnāṭṭuṣtone lost. �la Amarapuyaṅkanallūril Ittevar śrīkā
riyam ceyvārkaḷ vacam viṭṭaṣtone lost. Irupattunāṟkalaṉe Aṟunāḻikku nila
m nan=ti paṉmanukku nām kāṇiyākaṣtone lost. ttil Amarapuyaṅkamaṉnaṟaiyil nila m AUnfinished.
Digital edition of SII 5.228 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Renato Dávalos.
